mapper.sql: id, user_id, source_type, source_id, source_title, source_author_id, source_snapshot, transform_mode, target_types, status, source_hash, summary_text, fail_reason, total_candidates, published_candidates, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_asset_record SET status = #{status}, summary_text = #{summaryText}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, total_candidates = #{totalCandidates}, published_candidates = #{publishedCandidates}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM learning_asset_record WHERE status != 'FAILED'

SELECT source_type AS sourceType, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM learning_asset_record GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY totalCount DESC, source_type ASC
SELECT fail_reason AS failReason, COUNT(1) AS count FROM learning_asset_record WHERE fail_reason IS NOT NULL AND fail_reason != '' GROUP BY fail_reason ORDER BY count DESC, fail_reason ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, source_title AS sourceTitle, SUM(published_candidates) AS publishedCount FROM learning_asset_record GROUP BY source_type, source_id, source_title HAVING SUM(published_candidates) > 0 ORDER BY publishedCount DESC, source_id DESC LIMIT 10
